data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the 24h reminder SMS.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 24-hour reminder SMS, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm the implementation of this functionality. While the use case mentions the need for a 24h reminder, there are no concrete examples or evidence of the system generating such reminders. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of time-based trigger (24h before) implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the 24h reminder SMS functionality.
